title: Director of Early Childhood Education / Early Childhood Intervention
notes: Billings H S District 2 shares administration with Billings Elementary District 2 under Superintendent Dr. Erwin Garcia. Karen Underwood leads district Early Childhood Education / ECI (state-contracted home-based services for birth-36 mo). Cindy Keller is Preschool Coordinator (406-281-5362). Chris Olszewski serves as Curriculum Executive Director. ECI is a state-funded program contracted via OPI.

title: Deputy Superintendent of Instruction
notes: Bozeman Elem (BSD7) shares administration with Bozeman HS. Dr. Marilyn H. King oversees curriculum, instruction, assessment, special education, and District Programs. Sara Jones is Elementary Special Education Coordinator (early childhood services). District opened Bozeman Reads Early Learning Center fall 2024 - strong ECE buying signal. Superintendent: Casey Bertram (casey.bertram@bsd7.org). Email pattern first.last@bsd7.org confirmed by Bertram and Waterman.

title: Superintendent
notes: East Helena K-12 District 9 ~1,915 students. Dan Rispens is Superintendent (instructional leadership focus). District uses instructional coaching at all levels - notable curriculum/instructional support emphasis. No dedicated ECE director found; superintendent is decision-maker for curriculum. Central office at 250 Academic Street, East Helena, MT 59635.

title: Director of Student Achievement - Instructional Programs
notes: Belgrade Elem (BSD44) shares administration with Belgrade HS. Mat Johnston is the district's Curriculum/Instructional Programs lead. Superintendent: Dede Semerad (dsemerad@bsd44.org). District grew rapidly; major suburban district near Bozeman. Email pattern firstinitiallastname@bsd44.org confirmed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Whitefish H S (WSD44) shares administration with Whitefish Elem. Dave Means retiring effective June 30, 2026 (announced Nov 2025); Lisa Bloom serving as interim for 2026-27; Jenny Fee originally named successor but Michigan educator now offered position (Mar 2026). Email format inferred from district pattern (lastnamefirstinitial); use phone if email bounces. SUCCESSION TRANSITION underway.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: Havre Elem shares administration with Havre HS (~1,700 students). Holly Bitz, Asst Superintendent, leads testing/curriculum/hiring. Transitioned from Lincoln-McKinley Primary School Principal. Superintendent: Brian Gum. District piloted 4-day school week. Email pattern firstinitiallastname@blueponyk12.com inferred from district domain.

title: Superintendent
notes: Glendive Elem shares administration with Dawson HS. Stephen Schreibeis is Superintendent (Leadership Montana Class of 2021/Masters 2022). No dedicated curriculum director found. Director of Special Services: Val Hafele (hafelev@glendiveschools.org) handles related services. Note website is glendiveschools.com but emails use glendiveschools.org domain.

title: Superintendent
notes: Libby K-12 ~1,127 students across PK-12. Ron Goodman has been Superintendent since July 2020 (replaced Craig Barringer). District-wide email is sd@libbyschools.org (best confirmed contact). Specific superintendent email not publicly listed. Central office: 724 Louisiana Ave, Libby, MT 59923.

title: Superintendent
notes: Anaconda H S District 10 shares administration with Anaconda Elem. Dr. Tiffany Rehbein joined as Superintendent July 1, 2025 (replaced Tim Norbeck who served briefly after Justin Barnes resignation - significant turnover). Norah Barney serves as Special Education and Curriculum Director. New super = good outreach window. Central office: 1410 West Park Ave, Anaconda, MT 59711.

title: Superintendent
notes: Manhattan School District #3 (small PK-8/9-12 ~600 students near Bozeman). Brian K. Ayers is District Superintendent and curriculum decision-maker. District website is rollontigers.org; email domain is mhstigers.org. Address: PO Box 425, 416 North Broadway, Manhattan, MT 59741.

title: Superintendent
notes: Stevensville Elem shares administration with Stevensville HS. Jon Konen is Superintendent (came from prior superintendent role). District ~1,400 students in Bitterroot Valley. Address: 300 Park Avenue, Stevensville, MT. No dedicated curriculum director found at district level.

title: Superintendent
notes: Darby K-12 ~334 students PK-12 in Bitterroot Valley. Tony Biesiot is District Superintendent. District has Curriculum Review for 24/25 ongoing per website - active curriculum signal. Offers Project Lead The Way, Gifted & Talented, six career pathways. Email format firstnamelastname or lastnamefirstinitial@darby.k12.mt.us pattern; verify via phone.

title: Superintendent
notes: Troy Elem shares administration with Troy HS, Lincoln County. Christina Schertel is Superintendent. Andrea Cummings is Elementary Principal. Small district, super is the curriculum decision-maker. Address: 501 E. Kalispell Ave, Troy, MT 59935.

title: Superintendent
notes: Somers Lakeside School District 29 - K-8 elementary district near Flathead Lake. Alex Ator started as Superintendent (replaced retiring Joe Price) - new hire from Feb 2025 board vote, $120K 2-year contract. Previously super/principal at Roberts Public School. NEW HIRE = good outreach timing. Address: 315 School Addition Rd., Somers, MT 59932.

title: Superintendent
notes: Shelby Elem shares administration with Shelby HS. Elliott Crump is Superintendent. District is part of Golden Triangle Curriculum Cooperative (GTCC) - collaborative curriculum initiatives. Email pattern firstinitiallastname@shelbypublicschools.org inferred; verify via phone. Note: superintendent had a Mar 2026 DUI incident per news.

title: Superintendent / HS Principal
notes: Choteau H S shares administration with Choteau Elem. Matt Cornelius is Superintendent and HS Principal (dual role). Background as science teacher; published peer-reviewed paper on human consciousness. Email format first.last@choteauschools.net confirmed via other staff (e.g., julie.shepherd, john.shepherd). Teton County. Address: 102 7th Ave NW, Choteau, MT 59422.

title: Superintendent / Title IX Coordinator
notes: Belt Public School - small K-12 district, Cascade County. Joe Gaylord is Superintendent (also Title IX Coordinator). Kyle Paulson is Principal. Address: PO Box 197, #1 Church Street, Belt, MT 59412. Email format firstinitiallastname@beltschool.com inferred from district domain; verify via phone.

title: Superintendent
notes: Big Sandy K-12 ~197 students PK-12. Dan Schrock has been Superintendent since July 2022. Nick Rose is an administrator at Big Sandy Elementary. Small district; super is curriculum decision-maker. Address: 398 1st Avenue, Big Sandy, MT 59520.

title: County Superintendent (supervises districts without district super)
notes: Hutterite Colony school in Blaine County. NO district administrators or school administrators per NCES 2022-23 (0.00 FTE). State law assigns County Superintendent (Blaine County) general supervision of schools without dedicated district super or principal. ~2 FTE teachers, ~10 students. Not a viable Brightwheel Experience target - tiny Hutterite colony school with no district staff. Recommend skipping; if outreach needed, contact Blaine County Superintendent of Schools office.

title: Superintendent
notes: Saco K-12 - very small district, ~31 students, rural/remote Phillips County. Tanya Funk is Superintendent. Saco Elem shares administration with Saco HS. Address: PO Box 298, 321 Hwy 243, Saco, MT 59261. Email format firstinitiallastname@sacoschools.k12.mt.us inferred; verify via phone.

title: Superintendent
notes: Frazer Elem (District 2 & 2B) on Fort Peck Indian Reservation. Dr. Sarah Ruff started as Superintendent Aug 2024; initially announced January resignation but agreed to stay (May 2025). Implemented community-focused initiatives: Bear's Den for elders, daily community circle, elders' lunches. Principal: Reyna Monteau. TRIBAL DISTRICT - likely Head Start partnership. General email frazer@frazer.k12.mt.us. Email format firstinitiallastname@frazer.k12.mt.us inferred.

title: Superintendent
notes: Culbertson H S shares administration with Culbertson Elem (District 17-C). Larry Crowder is Superintendent. ~131 students. Address: 423 1st Avenue West, Culbertson, MT 59218. Email format lastnamefirstinitial@culbertsonschool.com inferred; verify via phone.

title: Superintendent
notes: Fairview School District 3 & 13 (border w/ ND). Luke Kloker is Superintendent (8 years as super, 20 years in Fairview, 12 prior as K-12 Principal). Rick Miller is HS Principal; Angela Gustafson is Elementary/JH Principal. Address: 713 S Western Ave, PO Box 467, Fairview, MT 59221.

title: Superintendent

title: Superintendent / 7-12 Principal
notes: Wibaux K-12 Schools. Annie (Alicia) Begger is Superintendent and 7-12 Principal (dual role). Note email domain is wibauxschool.net (singular) while website is wibauxschools.net (plural). Address: 121 F Street N, Wibaux MT 59353. Small district where super is curriculum decision-maker.

title: Superintendent
notes: Park City H S shares administration with Park City Elem, Stillwater County. District suffered wind storm roof destruction Jan 2026. Email pattern firstinitiallastname@parkcityschools.org inferred.

title: Superintendent
notes: Columbus Public Schools (Stillwater County), three schools: HS (433 N 3rd St), MS (415 N 3rd St), Elem (218 E 1st Ave). Casey Klasna is Superintendent. Active website is columbuscougars.com. Email format lastnamefirstinitial@columbuscougars.com inferred; verify via phone.

title: Superintendent
notes: Huntley Project K-12 Schools - one of larger rural districts, ~121 staff, serves Worden/Ballantine/Huntley/Pompeys Pillar area (Yellowstone County). Mark Wandle is Superintendent. District considered 4-day school week (recent buying/staffing signal). No dedicated ECE director; super is decision-maker.

title: Superintendent

Email format firstinitiallastname@lgschools.org inferred; verify via phone.

title: Superintendent

District has experienced turbulent leadership (Theresa Keel suspended Dec 2023; Marcy Cobell prior). TRIBAL DISTRICT - Head Start partnership likely. Email format firstinitiallastname@lamedeerschools.org (75% pattern per ContactOut); verify via phone.

title: Administrator (likely Superintendent/Principal)

Lori Reierson is Secretary (lreierson@rhs12.com); Chasmine Bell is Business Manager (cbell@rhs12.com). Email needed - confirm role via phone. Mascot: Wranglers. Address: 601 Main Street, Rosebud, MT 59347.
